column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, stepping outside taking a deep breath of spring air, suddenly frozen" | TEXT="んっ" P2: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, rubbing his nose gently with one finger, suspicious look" | TEXT="ムズムズする" P3: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, eyes opening wide as to feel an impending sneeze, face contorting" | TEXT="くるぞ" P4: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, sneezing violently with an epic face expression, body bending over" | TEXT="ぶぇっくしょん" P5: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, looking around nervously, sniffing the air like a dog" | TEXT="飛んでるな" P6: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, looking defeated, a single tear falling from a red eye" | TEXT="始まりました" P7: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, furiously scratching his itchy eyes with both fists" | TEXT="痒いよー" P8: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, checking a smartphone weather app showing high pollen alert, screaming" | TEXT="冗談だろ" P9: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, hastily putting on a large white surgical mask, looking determined" | TEXT="完全防備"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, wearing huge protective goggles over his tights face, thumbs up" | TEXT="目は守る" P2: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, dual wielding air freshener sprays like guns, striking an action pose" | TEXT="撃退してやる" P3: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, wrapping toilet paper round and round his neck like a scarf" | TEXT="ティッシュ必須" P4: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, aggressively brushing a coat with a lint roller, crazy eyes" | TEXT="家に持ち込まん" P5: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, installing a massive air purifier, bowing down to it praying" | TEXT="神様仏様" P6: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, sticking tissues up both nostrils, looking completely uncool but serious" | TEXT="背に腹は代えられぬ" P7: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, wearing a full hazmat suit over his tights, holding a stop sign" | TEXT="外出危険" P8: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, drinking a mystery green health potion aggressively from a bottle" | TEXT="これで治るはず" P9: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, doing a bizarre anti-pollen rain dance, waving arms" | TEXT="花粉退散"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, trying to eat noodles but stopping to sneeze, noodles dropping" | TEXT="食事もままならん" P2: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, nose running like a waterfall, holding a whole tissue box like a teddy bear" | TEXT="箱ごと抱える" P3: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, looking at the trash can overflowing like a mountain of used tissues" | TEXT="ティッシュの山" P4: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, rubbing extremely red, swollen eyes, looking like a zombie" | TEXT="ゾンビ化" P5: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, voice totally gone, communicating with a white board saying HELP" | TEXT="声が出ない" P6: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, sleeping but waking up abruptly in extreme discomfort" | TEXT="眠れない" P7: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, trying to put eye drops in but hands shaking out of control" | TEXT="外した" P8: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, dramatically ripping his tights collar, unable to breathe properly" | TEXT="息苦しい" P9: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, curled up in a fetus position on the floor, accepting defeat" | TEXT="もう無理"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, pointing an accusatory finger fiercely at a large cedar tree" | TEXT="貴様のせいだ" P2: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, holding a toy chainsaw, threatening a tree with a glaring look" | TEXT="許さん" P3: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, looking up at a cloud of yellow pollen blowing from a tree, terrified" | TEXT="悪夢だ" P4: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, sobbing uncontrollably while leaning against a concrete wall, defeated" | TEXT="なぜこんな目に" P5: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, writing a letter of complaint with a giant feather pen, furious" | TEXT="抗議してやる" P6: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, begging to a cedar tree on his knees, hands clasped in prayer" | TEXT="お願いやめて" P7: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, building a tiny brick wall using a trowel to block yellow dust" | TEXT="鉄壁の防御" P8: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, getting a yellow pollen blast to the face like an explosion, soot covered" | TEXT="直撃" P9: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, holding a sign saying CUT THEM ALL, leading a one-man protest" | TEXT="断固反対"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, offering a fresh new tissue box to someone like a precious gift" | TEXT="使って" P2: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, bowing deeply in apology while holding a tissue over his nose" | TEXT="申し訳ない" P3: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, giving a weak thumbs up while blowing his nose continuously" | TEXT="大丈夫です" P4: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, doing an X sign crossing arms with red tired eyes" | TEXT="本日は休業" P5: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, saluting smartly while wearing medical mask and goggles" | TEXT="了解しました" P6: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, pleading look, pointing at his nose, asking for sympathy" | TEXT="助けて" P7: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, patting the back of another invisible person sympathetically" | TEXT="わかるよ" P8: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, waving hand weakly, surrounded by crumpled tissues on floor" | TEXT="お先に失礼" P9: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, passing a small bottle of high-grade nasal spray ceremoniously" | TEXT="これ試してみて"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, feeling the wind without a mask, looking cautiously optimistic" | TEXT="終わったか" P2: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, dramatically ripping off his mask, throwing his arms wide in joy" | TEXT="解放された" P3: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, taking a deeply refreshing deep breath through the nose, sparkling effect" | TEXT="鼻が通る" P4: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, looking proudly at his surviving half-empty last tissue box" | TEXT="よく戦った" P5: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, crying tears of purely happiness to see the clear blue spring sky" | TEXT="平和だ" P6: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, meditating peacefully on a cushion, radiating calm energy" | TEXT="悟り" P7: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, burning a mask in a tiny campfire, tribal dance" | TEXT="さらば" P8: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, suddenly sneezing one last time out of nowhere, surprised face" | TEXT="油断した" P9: ACTION/PROPS="man in full body tights, waving cheerfully but wearing the mask again just in case" | TEXT="また来年"
